`Title in German:` __Detektiv Conan Film 26: Das schwarze U-Boot__

#### Inhalt:
>Vor der Küste Tokyos versammeln sich Ingenieure aus der ganzen Welt, um die Inbetriebnahme der „Pacific Buoy“ vorzubereiten, mit der Überwachungskameras aller Polizeibehörden weltweit miteinander vernetzt und eine Gesichtserkennungssoftware getestet werden soll. Unterdessen lädt Sonoko ihre Freunde auf eine Reise ein, um Wale zu beobachten – Conan und die Detektiv Boys eingeschlossen. Als Conan erfährt, dass Gin von der Schwarzen Organisation einen Europol-Mitarbeiter ermordet hat, schleicht er sich aus Sorge auf ein Polizeischiff und infiltriert so die Einrichtung. Dort sind die Vorbereitungen für die vollständige Aktivierung des Systems in vollem Gange, bis eine Ingenieurin von der Schwarzen Organisation entführt wird und ihnen so ein USB-Stick mit speziellen Informationen in die Hände fällt. Doch dem nicht genug, denn aus den Tiefen des Ozeans taucht eine weitere Gefahr auf …

title: [MrManager] Riding Bean (1989) BDRemux (Dual Audio, Special Features)
description:
![Riding Bean](https://i.imgur.com/0FMf1AR.png)

(From [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Riding_Bean)):
Riding Bean (ライディング・ビーン) is a 1989 anime original video animation following the exploits of courier-for-hire Bean Bandit and his partner, gunwoman Rally Vincent. 

![Riding Bean](https://i.imgur.com/s7Ia87d.png)

This is a remux of the new 2024 US Blu-ray by AnimEigo. They have previously released this OVA on Blu-Ray in 2017 with a Kickstarter, but this new release features improved video encoding and more professional-looking subtitle formatting, along with the German and Catalan dubs.

This remux takes the video and audio from this new release, along with the commentary tracks from the older Kickstarter disc, and puts them together in one easy package.
Also included in an interview with Kenichi Sonoda.

(If you want to see my remux of the older Kickstarter release, [Click Here!](https://nyaa.si/view/1739221))

![Riding Bean](https://i.imgur.com/YdJmRx1.png)

Given this is a remux, no extra encoding was performed to preserve the disc's quality. The video is the original H.264 encoded present on the original disc, and is a 4:3 1080p picture pillarboxed to 16:9. The original Japanese audio, English, German, & Catalan Dubs, the three commentaries, and the various subtitle tracks are all taken from both discs.


![Riding Bean](https://i.imgur.com/1fCfmLy.png)

Media Summary:
Video Codec: AVC H.264
Audio Codec: PCM
Subtitles: AnimEigo (PGS)


![Riding Bean](https://i.imgur.com/ouuyX0d.png)

See you next time.

___

**I have made the decision to use the manga's naming of Rin's personas (Imp-chan -> Cheeky-chan). Future episodes will now contain them, and in batch, they will have them as well.**

Little to be done in this episode. Typesetting restyled, and one sign was retracked. OP/ED added ofc.

**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Дубляжная](https://vk.com/dublyajnaya)
**Перевод  #3:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)
**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-10

**Описание:**
Классик японской литературы Осаму Дадзай должен был умереть после самоубийства в 1948 году. Но в последнюю минуту ему помешал Грузовик-кун, удар которого зашвырнул писателя в фэнтезийный мир, где, как водится, полно невероятных приключений, крутых способностей и милых фэнтезийных девочек. Вот только ему всего этого не надо. Меланхоличный литератор всё так же лелеет свою поэтическую мечту найти идеальное место для смерти. Но как бы он ни рисковал и в какие бы опасности ни влезал, всё всегда оборачивается в его пользу, к его полнейшему разочарованию.

description:
![a](https://iili.io/dwvgLfj.jpg)

Raws: BiliBilitv
English softsub: BiliBilitv
No hardsub (only ep13)

Note: good Sci-Fi anime, but it have some random video/audio/subtitle issues. This is direct copy from BiliBilitv i didin't changes anything. Ep1-3, ep14, ep21 are 24fps but have weird stuttering. Since ep4 (ep4-13, ep15-20, ep22-25) studio started releasing episodes in 60fps, no more stuttering but 60fps have other problems. Ep13 is copy from YouTube cause BiliBilitv version didn't have special effect sounds (guns, explosions, etc) and was just battle music playing instead. If skip/fast forward video sometimes audio doesn't load for few sec (audio fine if watch without skipping). Many parts have audio sync issues. Some subtitles have so much text that covers half screen for few sec. Last episode ending song is good.

title: [Yoghurt] Bokutachi no Remake [BD 1080p HEVC FLAC] | Remake Our Life!
information: have a ripper day and spread a lil bit of happiness to the special ppl in ur life.
description:
![](https://s4.anilist.co/file/anilistcdn/media/anime/cover/large/bx114065-YPPyW7ZSxfYU.jpg)
| **Sources**  | | 
| ------------- |-------------|
| Video       | [[Kawaiika-Raws]](https://nyaa.si/view/1476103) |
| Audio       | [[Kawaiika-Raws]](https://nyaa.si/view/1476103) (Japanese 2.0 FLAC 16-bit) |
| Subtitles  | [[Kawaiika-Raws]](https://nyaa.si/view/1476103) (English) which sourced from [[EMBER]](https://nyaa.si/view/1594273) |
| MediaInfo  | https://p.ip.fi/LuHW |
| [Synopsis](https://anilist.co/anime/114065/Bokutachi-no-Remake/) | 28-year old Hashiba Kyouya has hit a new low after losing his job at a shady game developer. He originally quit his steady office job to work in the creative industries that he admires, but it's proving to be a challenge even for a motivated go-getter like him. As he finds himself back at his parents house, between jobs, he can't help but wonder what would happen if he had a chance to redo his collegiate studies. Maybe things would turn out differently if he had gone to art school instead... and, shockingly enough, he might just get a chance to test that theory. |


Release Notes:
literally just kawaiika muxed. surprised no-one else had done it on nyaa, if anyone has the pog42 release that's on ab, this's identical to that. not doin dual audio because this is a copy for my personal archives, and no shot i'm watching this series again, let alone dubbed ay.
 

My Rating: 6.5/10 some parts are rly good, but overall didn't stick the landing. ~~idk watched this series when it was airing and forgot bloody everything~~ 

- - -
Be sure to keep seeding as I can't consistently seed, and can't seed forever.

title: [喵萌奶茶屋&VCB-Studio] 死神少爷与黑女仆 / Shinigami Bocchan to Kuro Maid 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [S1 Fin]
description:
![Shinigami_Bocchan_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/08/20/Shinigami_Bocchan_800.webp)  
  
死神少爷与黑女仆 S1 BDRip  
Shinigami Bocchan to Kuro Maid S1 BDRip  
死神坊ちゃんと黒メイド S1 BDRip  
  
部分剧集内封评论音轨。  
Certain episodes contain commentary tracks.  
  
这个项目与 **喵萌奶茶屋** 合作，感谢他们精心制作的字幕。  
This project is in collaboration with **Nekomoe kissaten**. Thanks to them for elaborating Chinese subtitles.  
  
原盘画质一般，原生分辨率 900p。本片是 3 渲 2 制作，有非常强的锯齿，线条还略有一些振铃。背景是独特的油画画风，有非常多的凹凸颗粒效果，得益于此背景没有太多色带。前景质量就略逊一筹，部分动态场景有色带。OP 有较强的红蓝对比，部分场景的色度平面质量不太理想。除此之外就没什么太大的瑕疵了。  
主要处理就是逆向拉升重构、抗锯齿、去振铃、去色带、补偿性锐化。考虑到背景画风，我们仅做了较轻的自适应降噪，并且补偿了一定的动噪。至于 OP 部分，我们使用神经网络算法对色度平面进行了重构，其余处理和正片一致。另外有几个特典有极强的色带，我们也进行了针对性处理。  
The image quality of the source is average, with a native resolution of 900p. This work is produced using a 3-2 celshading method, resulting in significant aliasing and slight ringing around the lines. The background features a unique oil painting art style with a heavily textured effect, which fortunately minimizes color banding. However, the foreground quality is somewhat inferior, with color banding in some dynamic scenes. The OP has a strong red and blue contrast, and the chroma plane quality in some scenes is not ideal. There are no more major artifacts aside from these.  
The main processing involved descaling and reconstruction, anti-aliasing, de-ringing, de-banding, and compensatory sharpening. Considering the background art style, we applied only mild adaptive denoising and compensated for some dynamic noise. For the OP, we applied a neural network algorithm to reconstruct the chroma plane, with other processing similar to the main content. Additionally, the severe color banding in several SPs was addressed with targeted processing.  
  

* * *

感谢所有参与制作者 / Thanks to our participating members:  
总监 / Script: 少爷  
压制 / Encode: 爱丽丝  
整理 / Collate: maboroshi  
发布 / Upload: 罗伯  
分流 / Seed: VCB-Studio CDN 分流成员  
  
感谢所有资源提供者 / Thanks to all resource providers:  
BD&SPCD&Scans: MDU

本项目文件名较长，下载时请注意存放路径，以免发生无法下载的情况。

description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.*
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

| [MediaInfo](https://rentry.co/pabbrknw/raw) | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Amazon Hidive Channel (AVC) via Erai-raws    |
| Audio     | Amazon Hidive Channel (EAC3) via Erai-raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | Automatic  |

> Fansub recommendation if you can wait: **Starsugen**

---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

---

**Comment:**

> My server hardware is toast, I have to setup the whole system on the new server. I have the basic system ported but not full automation yet. In the meantime expect possible issues and delays.
> 
> On an unrelated note, this week the Netflix stream is low quality since they messed up so this is the best for now.

Hello 👋

This episode is mainly a **recap episode**, with no new story/plot, meaning that a good chunk of the dialogue has already been translated.
I used DB and neohevc's subs for a good chunk of this episode, so big thanks to them.

For the other dialogue, I did have to use machine translation (booo). I think it's ok though. All was checked and edited to sound human.
I used both chinese subs and the japanese audio to translate it, so hopefully, I didn't miss any details in what was actually said.
Most of the untranslated dialogue is a child speaking, so their dialect isn't too advanced anyways.

[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/jbVBTmUYbw) is available for any questions or if you need to contact me.

---

### Changes
- Added dialogue (partly from existing EN subs)
- Added typesetting from EN subs or myself
- Added songs from EN subs
- Retimed when necessary

---

### Credits
- Translations
-- [DB+neohevc](https://nyaa.si/view/1678808) for EN translations
-- [7³ACG & KitaujiSub](https://nyaa.si/view/1686220) for CN translations
- Majority of Typesetting: [DB+neohevc](https://nyaa.si/view/1678808)
- Songs/Karaoke: [DB+neohevc](https://nyaa.si/view/1678808)
- Encode: [7³ACG & KitaujiSub](https://nyaa.si/view/1686220)

---

### Mediainfo
- Video: x265 HEVC Blu-ray Encode
- Audio: FLAC 2.0 Japanese
- Subtitles: English ASS

title: Doraemon (1979) - 1144 Stories + 15 TV Specials + 28 Special Broadcasts
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/3bXfmDU.png)

This is a repack of TVrips shared by different uploaders. However, being reruns of TV Asahi's CS channels, these have the following disadvantages.

- Slowed down frames, especially in scenes that use pakapaka technique and other fast moving scenes.
- Stories and TV Specials that have been completely skipped and therefore have not been shown again.
- The master video of the Story 0015 is from modified version that was included on Time Machine DVD Box collection re-released in 2012. In other previous DVD and VHS collections have the original version.
- The Eyecatchs were removed from the 1979-1981 stories that were remastered and broadcast in the 100-hour marathon in August 2020.

Despite those problems, there is a lot of content that it has not yet been captured and shared. Alternatively, If anyone has the 60-volume DVD collection, it can extract some stories that don't currently have rerun and have been skipped in different distributions, such as Story 0010. Holiday or other Seasonal Specials such as Spring, Summer, Autumn and Winter it's Special Broadcast Program, not to be confused with TV Specials. In 25 years, Doraemon (1979) had 93 Special Broadcasts and 30 TV Specials, some of these had reruns on TV Asahi's CS channels.

__Changes from the [previous batch](https://nyaa.si/view/1627003):__
1. Added 150 stories.
2. Added 7 TV Specials.
3. 535 stories were encoded from MPG source (I would have liked these to be TS but no way) that was shared on Web Archive. I assume those caps were recorded on DVD because the video it's 720x480 MPEG interlaced and AC3 audio format. The reason for making a new encode using that source was to have videos without black bars and set the correct 23.976 fps to replace the other videos (originally from Web Archive) that were encoded at 29.97 fps. The other stories that did not have a replacement, remain in this batch.
   - The downside of making this replacement is 151 stories have only 1 channel audio (L side). I tried mux the new encoded video with the AAC audio from the old video but there were sync problems. I had to keep the AC3 audio but so that the R channel would not be mute, I decided to remove it. For these stories the tag "mono" was added to the file name.
4. TV Special and Special Broadcast now have their own folders
5. 15 New Year's Eve Special Broadcasts have been added. It should be mentioned that the TV Asahi CS reruns don't show all stories and anime bridge that were on [Original Broadcast](https://hanaballoon.com/dorachan/data/anime/ooyama/sp/index.html).
6. The Extra folder includes 2 creditless versions of Opening theme were showed in 2017 marathons.

If anyone has the ISOs of all 60 DVD volumes, please share them.

Товарищи деды, настало время сводить олдскулы! Перед нами главный не исекай релиз летнего сезона - ремейк UFO Robo Grendizer, которого мы все так любили смотреть в детстве, да не от абы кого а от команды Fukushima Gainax а режиссирует Фукуда Мицуо приложивший свою руку к Гандамам и многим другим аниме жанра меха и подвести не должен. По 1 серии ясно что сохранен дух оригинала и выделены деньги на графоний, хоть местами и видно 3д анимацию, но редко, в основном в 2д. Вобщем смотрим и вспоминаем детство)

***

**Тип:** TV

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://vk.com/jamfans/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)

**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-10

**Описание:**
Бог ветра Сил по ошибке убивает Такуми. В качестве извинений бог отправляет Такуми в мир Этелдия. Однако это малоприятное место, представляющее собой огромный лес, наполненный опасными монстрами... В лесу Такуми находит близнецов — мальчика и девочку. Он беспокоится о малышах, даёт им имена Аллен и Елена и решает заботиться о них. Вскоре оказывается, что дети не так просты и могут победить монстра голыми руками. Добравшись до города, новоиспечённый родитель решает зарегистрироваться в гильдии, чтобы заработать на жизнь. Он начинает свою жизнь как искатель приключений, одновременно заботясь о детях.

title: Lum The Invader Girl/Urusei Yatsura Bbc Dub Remaster Complete Collection (NSSB)
description:
Hello everyone, Napa Super Saiyan Blue here. Welcome back to those of you who have seen my previous torrents of this dub and are wondering why I'm making another. This one is re-edited to be better than the previous one, as the torrents I did before kept the Japanese title cards. Technically, I uploaded part 1 of the re-edit and then deleted the old one a while back, but I exported it badly. I've had this new version of part 1 on the Internet Archive for a while. However, I redid the end credits of part 1 using a high-quality source from the Discotek Blu-ray. Part 2's new edit has recently been completed after I had been holding off on doing so for a while. Until we meet again, cya, and happy torrenting! Please remember to keep seeding.

![alt text](https://i.postimg.cc/tC5xH6TB/vlcsnap-2024-08-21-03h15m45s383.png)

title: [Weeaboo-Shogun] Shinkalion Change the World Special Episode Aug 2024 "Memories of Battle"
description:
WEEABOO SHOGUN PRESENTS
Shinkalion: Change the World
Special Episode
"Memories of Battle"

Famous TV commentator Akira Fukuzawa presents the exciting battles that have taken place between the Shinkalions and the Unknown in the way that only he can... JUST MEET!

NOTES:
This is a recap episode, but a fun one notable for an actual appearance by the famous commentator Akira Fukuzawa, who is known for numerous commentator roles, but perhaps most spectacularly for All Japan Pro Wrestling. He even made the Guinness Book of World Records for the longest scream: 61.53 seconds.

title: Puella Magi Magica Madoka Oriko Suzune Homura Tamura Kazumi Tart (Digital) (Oak Stick Kaos LuCaZ Anon)
description:
The Good Resolution Collection Leveled; All rips are of the correct (Shitty Yen Press) resolution and are leveled (color corrected).
Thanks to Stick and Kaos for getting the correct resolution rips previous not available, and to anon which I've used the remaining ones.

For those that would like the untouched (as in unleveled) version: https://nyaa.si/view/1862812

----

In general all volumes are leveled with `10,100%,1.18` my default values for Yen Press black releases, with a few exceptions;
- Puella Magi Suzune Magica volume 3 is leveled with `12,100%,1.22` had grayer blacks.
- Puella Magi Tart Magica: The Legend of Jeanne d'Arc volume 3 is leveled with `16,100%,1.25` as it has very noisy blacks.
- Puella Magi Oriko Magica volume 1 not leveled as blacks were already proper blacks.
- Puella Magi Oriko Magica volume 2 is slightly leveled with `2.5,100%,1.04`  as it had noisy blacks and to remove the brush color they used to clean the bubbles.

title: [HatSubs] One Piece 1071-1078 (BD 1080p 10-bit Opus)
description:
![AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA](https://i.imgur.com/Izy75h8.png)

Translation: Official
Editing: Notkama, occasionally Giraffebirbyuimumei (1073.5, 1075, parts of 1076, 1078)
Timing, Translation Check, Typesetting, Encoding: Giraffebirbyuimumei
Additional typesetting in 1072: hydes (via RedDeadProject)
Quality Check: Toa of Gallifrey, Notkama

1071 comes next after 1016, right? :D
...Okay yeah, so we skipped over fifty episodes to BD-ify the Wano endgame. There are several reasons why we opted to go this route but chief among them is... we just wanted to?
These might be the most in-depth rechecks we've done for any eps of the show to date, which did result in this taking nearly three months to put together (no thanks in part to the editor's real-life obligations) and probably goes to show that if we ever want to get all of the other eps out on BD, we need to scale back our ambitions a little bit. Still, we think the end result speaks for itself.
Back when 1074 first came out, we mentioned the styling for the opening was subject to change. As of this release, it has changed. The translation has also been revised for both that and the ending.
Huge thanks to RedDeadProject, who kindly offered us to use their typesetting for the grave in 1072.

To avoid running into problems playing any of our releases, [please use mpv!](https://iamscum.wordpress.com/guides/videoplayback-guide/)

## What is this?

Hello again,

It was a long week for everyone involved but we finally got this episode out and managed to do it a few hours before episode 8 airs.

TS-kun slaved away and did some amazing work as usual. TL-kun got things translated quickly as usual. ENC-kun had to do 3 encodes this week due to losing one at 96% due to a power outage. Then had to manually fix a few things due to this episode pushing up against the bitrate buffer for the entire first half. Things are a bit larger this week due to this ep containing 66 invidiual zones and over 100 forced I-frames.

Sorry for the delay. There was a lot of work for everyone this week!

## BONUS CONTENT!:

This week Ts-kun made a custom mouse cursor based on the one used by Koshi-tan in this episode. You can find it included inside of the .mkv file.

You can also download it here: https://files.catbox.moe/kw8clr.cur

## Sources used:

- Video 1: Erai-raws (CR WEBRip)
- Audio: ZigZag (Anime Onegai WEBRip)
- Subtitles: Original translation by anon (not based on any existing scripts)
- Localization: Partial (Honorifics and some Japanese terms not translated)
- Japanese closed captions: SweetSub with minor edits by anon
- Chapters: YES, Not as many as lask week though.

## How to play:

All our releases are designed for playback on set-top devices (e.g. AppleTV, Firesticks, Xbox One) with native .ass rendering support provided you use a good software player. For most devices we suggest KODI with either a third party Plex or Jellyfin plug-in. For AppleTV we HIGHLY suggest Infuse. Which will play back our releases for free since we use AAC/Opus audio. All our release playback on PC as well of course. We HIGHLY suggest using mpv or recent fork of MPC-HC with proper libass renderer.

Note that if your device can not render .ass subtitles we've included an SRT version of the script. It's the same translation without signs due to the limitations of the SubRip subtitle format. These will work for devices that can't natively render .ass like Roku.

## Deer tips:

We haven't had a proper deer tips in two weeks now so it's about time we started providing them again. This week we'll discuss proper bullet selection for hunting deer in the field.

If you search around the internet you'll find a bunch of "experts" that claim you need a 20mm cannon to hunt deer. As with most things filled "expert" opinions this isn't really true. While it is true that a larger bullet will kill deer more quickly and reliably a bullet like a 300 Winchester Magnum is absolutely not required to hunt deer. In fact, I consider a bullet of this size to be over kill. This goes for all the "wonder" bullets on the market that cost $1+ per round. The truth is more deer have been killed with the good old .22lr than any other cartridge in the world. The little .22lr is plenty for dree and other mid-sized game animals. But it does require proper shot placement and skill. You also need to keep range in mind when using such a small bullet. You don't want to wound and lose an animal. Especially when it's the difference between eating and not eating.

While it works the .22lr is not exactly ideal. As such I suggest using nothing smaller than .410 shotshell. The .410 bore shotgun is the perfect combination of size, weight, stopping power and range for a new/youth hunter. It's the ideal firearm for children, women and other small framed people. They are also generally cheap and pack enough stopping power for home defense situations. For deer in particular I highly reccomend the .410 slug. Which should be fine for taking deer within 100 yards.

The only downside to .410 shotshells is they tend to be less common than the 12 gauge. So if you're up to the additional kick and recoil of the larger shotshell 12 gauge is probably what you want. I suggest using #4 or 00 (double alt) buckshot in 12 gauge. Slugs work to but they pack a wallop.

For rifles outside of .22lr most anything will work. I've taken deer with 30-06 out of an M1 Garand, .308, 30-30. The various .30 calibers are all fine provided you do your part. On the smaller side of things 5.56mm/.223 and related bullets will work just fine as well. Just be mindful of shot placement and the range. You do not need any wonder bullet loadings for cartridges like 5.56mm the standard 55gr military surplus works fine.

An SKS/AK in 7.62x39 will work fine as well and used to be my go to cheap rifle/bullet combo for this type of thing. But with the recent importing bans on surplus ammo along with what used to be $90-$200 rifles not over $1k on the second hand market I've using them as often. But if that's all you have then it will serve you fine in the field.

Next week we'll discuss how to make a friendly and inviting environment for your local deer. You'll have your own Noko sleeping in your backyard in no time.

## Contact us:

There has been some interest expressed in various places by people that have said they'd like to help out with things like QC and other stuff. If you'd like to contact us for any reason. Even just to say thanks you can do so here: deerstalker[at]waifu.club

## Want to send us money?

We'll never ask you for money. But if you feel like giving some away in lieu of donations to us (or any other group) we ask that you please send Nekotofu gambling money. You can send him gambling money here: https://grinp.fanbox.cc/

## Note:

While we can not respond to comments we do read them and make fixes if reported. You can always download our releases from our usual XDCC bot on Rizon and our MEGA archives.

You may use any part of this release in your own. All we ask is you follow the terms laid out in the Loli-GPL license. A copy of the NEW LGPLv2 license is included inside the .mkv file. You can also read it here: https://files.catbox.moe/lk9ot9.txt

Take care!

title: Slam Dunk - New Edition v08 (Colored Council) (Viz)
description:
This volume contains scans of the Viz volumes that have been compiled into a makeshift “New Edition", mostly based on the star edition released in France beginning in 2019.

This is intended to be a definitive release of Viz’s slam dunk since they are seemingly never going to release an english digital version. This release replaces the monochrome pages that were originally in color with typeset color pages from the Chinese Kanzenban edition.

Because this is a combination of three different releases, included at the end of the volume are covers an extra pages that we are contained the Viz release, Chinese Kanzenban release, and French Star Edition.
This release is going to replace the version previously released by Colored Council, which consisted of the typeset version over the French scans.

More to come soon.

Please Enjoy

Done by the Colored Council

title: [2024.08.21] 乃木坂46 36thシングル「チートデイ」[スペシャル盤] [FLAC]
description:
![cover](https://i.postimg.cc/7Pm9VRPV/image.jpg)
___
[内容紹介]

乃木坂46が8月21日にリリースする36thシングル『チートデイ』のCD収録楽曲と歌唱メンバーが公開された。

表題曲“チートデイ”、TVアニメ「ATRI-My Dear Moments-」オープニング・テーマ“あの光”のほか、テレビ東京系列「乃木坂工事中」の企画「新軍団ドラフトバトル」で結成された軍団によるユニット曲計3曲が各形態に収録。さらにはアンダー楽曲と5期生楽曲も収録されることが発表となり、今作もバリエーション豊かな全7曲での展開となる。ぜひチェックしてほしい。

title: [2024.08.21] 大原櫻子 - オールタイムシングルベスト2014-2024「Anniversary」[FLAC]
description:
![cover](https://i.postimg.cc/2ycxS19J/Cover-01.jpg)
___
[内容紹介]

大原櫻子の音楽活動10周年を記念する
全シングルを完全網羅した初のオールタイムシングルベスト

10周年のアニバーサリーソングとして、デビュー以来多くの楽曲をプロデュースしてきた亀田誠治との7年ぶりの再タッグが実現。

デビューのきっかけとなった映画「カノジョは嘘を愛しすぎてる」の劇中歌「明日も」の10年後を描く最新曲「Anniversary」、さらに同映画でCRUDE PLAYが歌う劇中歌「サヨナラの準備は、もうできていた」の初カバーの２曲の新録曲を収録。大原櫻子のシンガーとしての原点と現在を網羅した、まさに10年の活動の集大成となるメモリアルな作品となる。　　　　　　

グラミー賞受賞作品を数々手がけるエンジニアGoh Hotodaによるオリジナルマスターからの全曲完全リマスタリング盤。2枚組全34曲収録。

title: [2024.08.21] SARD UNDERGROUND 2nd オリジナル・アルバム「涙色で」[FLAC]
description:
![cover](https://i.postimg.cc/1tKHbCGy/Cover.jpg)
___
[内容紹介]

9月18日にデビュー5周年を迎えるSARD UNDERGROUNDが、2ndオリジナルフルアルバム『涙色で』と7thシングル「夢で逢いましょう」を8月21日に二作同時リリースすることが発表となった。

【収録曲】
1. 私と恋をしてください
作詞：神野友亜　作曲：藤中友哉　編曲：鶴澤夢人・長戸大幸

2. 涙色で
作詞：神野友亜　作曲：小澤正澄　編曲：小澤正澄

3. その結婚、正気ですか？
　作詞：神野友亜　作曲：小澤正澄　編曲：麻井寛史
　※TOKYO MX「その結婚、正気ですか？」オープニング主題歌

4. 夢で逢いましょう
　作詞：神野友亜　作曲：小澤正澄　編曲：小澤正澄
　※「名探偵コナン」エンディングテーマ

5. 星の光
　作詞：神野友亜　作曲：大野愛果　編曲：麻井寛史

6. フタリシズカ
　作詞：神野友亜　作曲：大野愛果　編曲：鶴澤夢人・長戸大幸

7. 琵琶湖大橋
　作詞：神野友亜　作曲：徳永暁人　編曲：徳永暁人

8. 役者犬のうた
　作詞：鮫島琉星　作曲：長戸大幸　編曲：徳永暁人

9. 雨は虹になる
　作詞：神野友亜　作曲：浅川悠魅　編曲：鈴木和哉

10. 卒業式
　作詞：神野友亜　作曲：徳永暁人　編曲：徳永暁人
　※ぎふチャン「めっちゃぎふわかるてれび」2月エンディングテーマ

11. sanae
　作詞：神野友亜　作曲：大野愛果　編曲：鈴木和哉

title: [2024.08.21] TVドラマ「完璧ワイフによる完璧な復讐計画」OP主題歌「Sorry not sorry」／GENIC [FLAC]
description:
![cover](https://i.postimg.cc/6Qnzf5T2/Cover.jpg)
___
[内容紹介]

男女7人組ダンス＆ボーカルグループGENICが、2か月連続で新曲をリリースする。

第1弾として7月31日に「LifE!!」、第2弾は8月21日に「Sorry not sorry」が配信リリースされる。

「Sorry not sorry」は、MBS/TBS系ドラマ『完璧ワイフによる完璧な復讐計画』オープニング主題歌として書き下ろされた楽曲で、メンバーの西澤呈が作詞を担当。「Sorry not sorry」（意訳：おあいにくさまだけど謝らないよ）というパワーワードが象徴的に描かれた、“騙し愛”ながらも自分の道を進む、人生は自分次第という強い意志が込められた作品になっているとのことだ。

[Mydramalist](https://mydramalist.com/773727-kanpeki-wife-ni-yoru-kanpeki-na-fukushu-keikaku)

description:
![cover](https://i.postimg.cc/zX2dJc9B/cover.jpg)
___
[内容紹介]

ano、新曲「愛してる、なんてね。」は、作詞をあのが手掛け、作曲は「普変」を手掛けたクリープハイプ尾崎世界観が担当、編曲は「スマイルあげない」を手掛けたケンモチヒデフミ。あのによる胸をギュッと締め付けられるようなリリックに、尾崎世界観のキャッチーなメロディライン、ケンモチヒデフミのアレンジがコントラストを生み出す新曲となっている。
